zh.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth是Tewdwr ap Cadell的兒子，於1051年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特。他於1075年與Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1088年登記服兵役。他去世於1093年4月30日之前在威爾士格拉莫爾根利斯，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth是Tewdwr ap Cadell的儿子，于1051年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特。他于1075年与Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1088年登记服兵役。他去世于1093年4月30日之前在威尔士格拉莫爾根利斯，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾特雷加隆。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth was born in 1051, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales as the son of Tewdwr ap Cadell. He married Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon in 1075, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1088. He died before 30 April 1093, in Penrice, Glamorgan, Wales, and was buried in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth est né en 1051, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, fils de Tewdwr ap Cadell. Il a épousé Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon en 1075, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1088. Il est décédé avant 30 avril 1093, à Penrice, Glamorgan, Galles, et a été enterré à Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth wurde 1051 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, als Sohn von Tewdwr ap Cadell geboren. Er hat 1075 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1088 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb vor 30. April 1093 in Penrice, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth è nato il nel 1051 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles come figlio di Tewdwr ap Cadell. Lui sposato Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon nel 1075, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1088. Morì prima del 30 aprile 1093, nel Penrice, Glamorgan, Galles, e fu sepolto a Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarthは1051年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントでTewdwr ap Cadellの息子として生まれた。1075年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでGwladys ferch Rhiwallonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1088年に兵役登録をした。彼は1093年4月30日以前にウェールズグラモーガンペンリスで死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアトレガーオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth(은)는 1051년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 Tewdwr ap Cadell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1075년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1088년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1093년 4월 30일 이전 웨일스 글램르건 펜라이스에서 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르 트레가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth nasceu em 1051, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales filho de Tewdwr ap Cadell. Ele casou-se com Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon em 1075, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1088. Ele faleceu antes 30 de abril de 1093, em Penrice, Glamorgan, Gales, e foi sepultado em Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.

ro.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth родился в 1051 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс. Его отца звали Tewdwr ap Cadell. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon в 1075 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1088 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 30 апрель 1093 г. в местности пенраис, глэморган, Уэльс и был похоронен в местности трегарон, кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Tewdwr Prince of Deheubarth nació en 1051, en Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales como hijo de Tewdwr ap Cadell. Se casó con Gwladys ferch Rhiwallon en 1075, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1088. Murió antes de 30 de abril de 1093, en Penrice, Glamorgan, Gales, y fue sepultado en Tregaron, Cardiganshire, Gales.
